metadata.description: Agent Skills built for real engineering work — not vibe coding. Each plugin is a self-contained spec-compliant skill (agentskills.io).

plugins.name: ppt-design-slider
plugins.description: Turn raw slide content into a designed PowerPoint deck. 36 embedded HTML templates (magazine + swiss + 34 editorial styles), splits user content into slides, always delivers PDF + image-based PPTX + editable PPTX (native pptxgenjs fallback when auto conversion can't). Runtime-neutral — works with any Agent Skills runtime.

plugins.name: gaya
plugins.description: Distill a heavyweight reference model's output quality (Opus 4.7) into a cheap small model by iteratively searching over the prompt and every OpenRouter API parameter, scored by an LLM-as-judge. Outputs a markdown report with the final prompt ready to paste.

plugins.name: transposition
plugins.description: Transfer the context of the current conversation to another window — another agent session, ChatGPT, Claude.ai, Gemini, or a human teammate. Four modes: brief, full, prompt, code-handoff.
